name: Milky Way Galaxy
description: Baryonic mass of the Milky Way: ~6×10¹⁰ solar masses (~1.19×10⁴¹ kg). Composition: ~50% warm/hot gas (ISM, primarily H/He), ~40% stellar material (Stellar Plasma proxy), ~10% interstellar dust (carbon-silicate grains). In SSBM, the dark matter halo is additional nested baryons; this load counts only the directly baryonic component. Note: ISM density is extremely low (~1.67×10⁻²¹ kg/m³) — the mass is delivered by the stated_mass_kg anchor.
